Auto-populate the model picker from the provider's model-list endpoint at launch. Turn off if the endpoint isn't reachable from your network, or to use a fixed list. When off, the model list below is required and must use full model IDs (aliases like sonnet/opus are resolved via discovery).
启动时从提供商的模型列表端点自动填充模型选择器。如果你的网络无法访问该端点，或需要使用固定列表，请关闭此项。关闭后，下面的模型列表为必填，且必须使用完整模型 ID（sonnet/opus 等别名会通过发现解析）。

Sent on every inference and model-discovery request (joined into the CLI's `ANTHROPIC_CUSTOM_HEADERS`).\n\nUse this for fleet-wide constants. For per-user or per-session values, have the **credential helper script** emit JSON with a `headers` field; those are merged over these static entries (helper wins on conflict).
发送到每个推理和模型发现请求（会合并进 CLI 的 `ANTHROPIC_CUSTOM_HEADERS`）。\n\n用于全员固定常量。对于按用户或按会话变化的值，请让**凭据辅助脚本**输出带有 `headers` 字段的 JSON；这些值会覆盖这里的静态条目（冲突时辅助脚本优先）。

Claude runs the executable with no arguments and reads **stdout** (trimmed). Exit code must be `0`; any output on **stderr** is logged but ignored. **Stdout must contain only one of the formats below** (no banners, prompts, or log lines).

**Output format** is either:
- a single bare token (the API key / bearer token), or
- a JSON object `{"token": "...", "headers": {"Name": "Value", ...}}` when per-request headers are needed (merged over **Custom inference headers**, helper wins on conflict)

Result is cached for the TTL below. On TTL expiry the helper is re-invoked transparently (no user prompt, no relaunch).

**Typical use:** a shell script that pulls from Keychain, 1Password CLI, or an internal secret broker. Example:

`security find-generic-password -s anthropic-api -w`

If this field is set, static credential fields (API key, bearer token) are ignored. The helper always wins.

Claude 会无参数执行该可执行文件，并读取 **stdout**（去除首尾空白）。退出码必须为 `0`；**stderr** 上的任何输出都会被记录但会被忽略。**Stdout 只能包含以下格式之一**（不要有横幅、提示或日志行）。

**输出格式**为：
- 一个裸 token（API 密钥 / bearer token），或
- 一个 JSON 对象 `{"token": "...", "headers": {"Name": "Value", ...}}`，用于需要按请求设置请求头的场景（会覆盖**自定义推理请求头**，冲突时辅助脚本优先）

结果会按下面的 TTL 缓存。TTL 过期后会透明地重新调用辅助脚本（不会提示用户，也无需重启）。

**典型用途：** 从钥匙串、1Password CLI 或内部密钥代理拉取凭据的 shell 脚本。示例：

`security find-generic-password -s anthropic-api -w`

设置此字段后，静态凭据字段（API 密钥、bearer token）会被忽略。辅助脚本始终优先。

Only affects **tool calls**. Inference and MCP traffic are covered by their own allowlists elsewhere.

When unset, only the inference endpoint is reachable from the sandbox; the agent's package installs (pip/npm) and web fetches will fail with a 403.

Accepts exact hostnames (`api.github.com`), wildcards (`*.corp.com` matches one subdomain level), and `*` to allow all.

Wildcards don't cross schemes. `*.corp.com` matches `docs.corp.com` but not `corp.com` itself; add both if you need the apex.

IP literals and localhost always resolve regardless of this list; this is a public-egress filter, not a sandbox.

Hosts you add here also need to be open on your network firewall. See **Egress Requirements** for the full allowlist.

仅影响**工具调用**。推理和 MCP 流量由各自的允许列表单独控制。

未设置时，沙箱只能访问推理端点；代理的包安装（pip/npm）和网页获取会因 403 失败。

接受精确主机名（`api.github.com`）、通配符（`*.corp.com` 匹配一级子域名）以及用于允许全部的 `*`。

通配符不会跨越层级。`*.corp.com` 匹配 `docs.corp.com`，但不匹配 `corp.com` 本身；如果需要根域，请两者都添加。

IP 字面量和 localhost 始终可解析，不受此列表影响；这是公网出站过滤器，不是沙箱。

你在这里添加的主机还需要在网络防火墙中放行。完整允许列表见**出站要求**。

"Essential" means the signals Anthropic needs to keep your deployment working: **crash stacks**, **startup failure reasons**, and **version/OS metadata**. No prompts, completions, file contents, or identifiers beyond a random install ID.

**What you lose when this is on:** when a Cowork build hits a bug that only reproduces on your OS version or locale, Anthropic can't see it unless a user manually reports. Fixes ship slower.

**Why this is discouraged, not blocked:** some air-gapped environments require zero outbound telemetry as a matter of policy. The switch exists for them. If you don't have that constraint, leave it off.

“必要”指 Anthropic 维持你的部署正常运行所需的信号：**崩溃堆栈**、**启动失败原因**和**版本/OS 元数据**。不包含提示词、补全、文件内容，也不包含随机安装 ID 以外的标识符。

**启用此项会失去什么：** 当 Cowork 构建遇到只在你的 OS 版本或区域设置下复现的 bug 时，除非用户手动报告，否则 Anthropic 无法看到。修复发布会更慢。

**为什么不建议但不阻止：** 一些隔离网络环境因政策要求零出站遥测。此开关就是为它们准备的。如果你没有这个约束，请保持关闭。

"Nonessential" covers two things: **product-usage analytics** (which features get used, navigation patterns; no prompts or completions) and the **Send** action in Help → Generate Diagnostic Report. Turning this on stops both.\n\nDestination for both: `claude.ai`. Already listed under Egress Requirements → Nonessential telemetry.
“非必要”包括两类内容：**产品使用分析**（使用了哪些功能、导航模式；不含提示词或补全）以及“帮助 → 生成诊断报告”中的**发送**操作。启用此项会同时停止两者。\n\n两者的目标地址均为：`claude.ai`。已列在“出站要求 → 非必要遥测”下。

description:"Choose where Claude Desktop sends inference requests."
description:"选择 Claude Desktop 发送推理请求的位置。"

description:"推理网关端点的完整 URL。"

description:"How to send the gateway credential. 'bearer' (default) sends Authorization: Bearer. Set 'x-api-key' only if your gateway requires the x-api-key header instead (e.g. api.anthropic.com). Set 'sso' to obtain the credential via the gateway's own browser-based sign-in (RFC 8414 discovery at `<inferenceGatewayBaseUrl>/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server` + RFC 8628 device-code grant); inferenceGatewayApiKey and inferenceCredentialHelper are not required."

description:"网关凭据的发送方式。'bearer'（默认）会发送 Authorization: Bearer。只有当网关要求使用 x-api-key 请求头时才设置为 'x-api-key'（例如 api.anthropic.com）。设置为 'sso' 时，会通过网关自己的浏览器登录获取凭据（在 `<inferenceGatewayBaseUrl>/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server` 做 RFC 8414 发现，并使用 RFC 8628 设备码授权）；此时不需要 inferenceGatewayApiKey 和 inferenceCredentialHelper。"
description:"Extra HTTP headers sent on every inference request. JSON array of 'Name: Value' strings."
description:"每个推理请求都会发送的额外 HTTP 请求头。填写由 'Name: Value' 字符串组成的 JSON 数组。"
hint:"Bearer (default) sends Authorization: Bearer. x-api-key is for the Anthropic API directly — auto-selected when the URL is *.anthropic.com."
hint:"Bearer（默认）会发送 Authorization: Bearer。x-api-key 用于直接连接 Anthropic API；当 URL 为 *.anthropic.com 时会自动选择。"
hint:"Extra headers sent to the gateway, one 'Name: Value' per entry. For tenant routing, org IDs, etc."
hint:"发送到网关的额外请求头，每行填写一个 'Name: Value'。可用于租户路由、组织 ID 等。"

body:"Sent on every inference and `/v1/models` discovery request (joined into the CLI's `ANTHROPIC_CUSTOM_HEADERS`).\n\nUse this for fleet-wide constants. For per-user or per-session values, have the **credential helper script** emit JSON with a `headers` field — those are merged over these static entries (helper wins on conflict)."
body:"会发送到每个推理和 `/v1/models` 发现请求（合并进 CLI 的 `ANTHROPIC_CUSTOM_HEADERS`）。\n\n用于全员固定常量。对于按用户或按会话变化的值，请让**凭据辅助脚本**输出带有 `headers` 字段的 JSON；这些值会覆盖这里的静态条目（冲突时辅助脚本优先）。"
description:"GCP region for the Vertex AI endpoint."
description:"Vertex AI 端点所在的 GCP 区域。"

description:"服务账号 JSON 或 ADC 文件的绝对路径。不支持波浪号或环境变量展开。"

description:"Client ID of a Desktop-app OAuth client created in your GCP project (APIs & Services → Credentials). When set together with the client secret, the app runs Sign in with Google and stores the resulting refresh token encrypted; `inferenceVertexCredentialsFile` is not needed."
description:"在 GCP 项目（API 和服务 → 凭据）中创建的桌面应用 OAuth 客户端 ID。与客户端密钥一起设置后，应用会执行 Google 登录，并加密存储获取到的刷新令牌；不再需要 `inferenceVertexCredentialsFile`。"
description:"Client secret for the Desktop-app OAuth client. Not confidential for installed apps per Google's docs — PKCE protects the flow."
description:"桌面应用 OAuth 客户端的客户端密钥。按 Google 文档，已安装应用的此密钥并非机密；流程由 PKCE 保护。"

description:"Space-separated OAuth scopes for the Google sign-in flow. Defaults to `openid email https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform`. Narrow this if your Workspace's Context-Aware Access or reauth policy restricts `cloud-platform`."
description:"Google 登录流程使用的 OAuth 范围，以空格分隔。默认值为 `openid email https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform`。如果你的 Workspace 上下文感知访问或重新认证策略限制了 `cloud-platform`，可在这里缩小范围。"
description:"Override the Vertex inference endpoint (e.g. a Private Service Connect address). Leave unset to use the public regional endpoint."
description:"覆盖 Vertex 推理端点（例如 Private Service Connect 地址）。留空则使用公共区域端点。"
description:"AWS region for the Bedrock runtime endpoint."
description:"Bedrock 运行时端点所在的 AWS 区域。"
description:"Override the Bedrock inference endpoint (e.g. a VPC interface endpoint or LLM gateway). Leave unset to use the public regional endpoint."
description:"覆盖 Bedrock 推理端点（例如 VPC 接口端点或 LLM 网关）。留空则使用公共区域端点。"
description:"AWS named profile to use (from the AWS config/credentials files). Ignored when inferenceBedrockBearerToken is set."
description:"要使用的 AWS 命名配置文件（来自 AWS config/credentials 文件）。设置 inferenceBedrockBearerToken 后会忽略此项。"

description:"Absolute path to the directory containing AWS config and credentials files. Optional — defaults to the user's ~/.aws when inferenceBedrockBearerToken is not set. Copied into the sandbox at session start so the named profile can be resolved."
description:"包含 AWS config 和 credentials 文件的目录绝对路径。可选；未设置 inferenceBedrockBearerToken 时默认使用用户的 ~/.aws。会在会话启动时复制到沙箱，以便解析命名配置文件。"

允许 Claude Code 标签页
Show the Code tab (terminal-based coding sessions). Sessions run on the host, not inside the VM.
显示 Code 标签页（基于终端的编码会话）。会话在主机上运行，而不是在虚拟机内运行。
Forces the agent loop, file/web tools, and plugin-bundled MCPs to run inside the VM, disabling host-loop mode.
强制代理循环、文件/网页工具以及插件内置 MCP 在虚拟机内运行，并禁用主机循环模式。
Runs tools inside an isolated VM instead of the host. Stronger isolation; slower file access and no host-process tools.
在隔离虚拟机内运行工具，而不是在主机上运行。隔离更强，但文件访问更慢，且没有主机进程工具。
Domains Cowork's tools may reach during a turn. Also surfaced under Egress Requirements.
Cowork 工具在一次回合中可访问的域名。也会显示在“出站要求”中。

Only affects **tool calls** — inference and MCP traffic are covered by their own allowlists elsewhere.

Accepts exact hostnames (`api.github.com`), wildcards (`*.corp.com` matches one subdomain level), and `*` to allow all.

Wildcards don't cross schemes. `*.corp.com` matches `docs.corp.com` but not `corp.com` itself — add both if you need the apex.

IP literals and localhost always resolve regardless of this list; this is a public-egress filter, not a sandbox.

Hosts you add here also need to be open on your network firewall — see **Egress Requirements** for the full allowlist.

仅影响**工具调用**；推理和 MCP 流量由各自的允许列表单独控制。

接受精确主机名（`api.github.com`）、通配符（`*.corp.com` 匹配一级子域名）以及用于允许全部的 `*`。

通配符不会跨层级。`*.corp.com` 匹配 `docs.corp.com`，但不匹配 `corp.com` 本身；如果需要根域，请两者都添加。

IP 字面量和 localhost 始终可解析，不受此列表影响；这是公网出站过滤器，不是沙箱。

你在这里添加的主机还需要在网络防火墙中放行；完整允许列表见**出站要求**。
从 Cowork 中移除的内置工具。
Folders users may attach as a workspace. Leave unset for unrestricted access.
用户可以作为工作区附加的文件夹。留空表示不限制访问。
Org-pushed remote MCP servers. May embed bearer tokens.
组织推送的远程 MCP 服务器。可能包含 bearer token。
允许用户添加 MCP 服务器

Permit users to add their own local (stdio) MCP servers via Developer settings. HTTP/SSE servers are managed separately. When false, only servers from the Managed MCP servers list and org-provisioned plugins are available.
允许用户通过开发者设置添加自己的本地（stdio）MCP 服务器。HTTP/SSE 服务器单独管理。关闭后，只能使用“托管 MCP 服务器”列表中的服务器以及组织预配的插件。
Local stdio servers added via the Developer settings. Remote servers come from the managed list above, or plugins mounted to a user's computer by an organization admin.
通过开发者设置添加的本地 stdio 服务器。远程服务器来自上方托管列表，或由组织管理员挂载到用户电脑的插件提供。
用户添加的 MCP（Python 运行时）
Permit users to install local desktop extensions (.dxt/.mcpb).
允许用户安装本地桌面扩展（.dxt/.mcpb）。
Show the Anthropic extension directory in the connectors UI.
在连接器界面中显示 Anthropic 扩展目录。
The in-app catalogue of installable extensions. Hide to allow sideload only.
应用内可安装扩展目录。隐藏后仅允许侧载。
Reject desktop extensions that are not signed by a trusted publisher.
拒绝未由可信发布者签名的桌面扩展。
Prompts, completions, and your data are never sent to Anthropic — telemetry covers crash and usage signals only.
提示词、补全和你的数据永远不会发送给 Anthropic；遥测只包含崩溃和使用信号。

Base URL of an OpenTelemetry collector. When set, Cowork sessions export logs and metrics (prompts, tool calls, token counts) to this endpoint via OTLP. The endpoint host is automatically added to the session network allowlist.
OpenTelemetry 收集器的基础 URL。设置后，Cowork 会话会通过 OTLP 将日志和指标（提示词、工具调用、token 数）导出到此端点。该端点主机会自动加入会话网络允许列表。
Where Cowork sends OpenTelemetry logs and metrics. Leave blank to disable.
Cowork 发送 OpenTelemetry 日志和指标的位置。留空则禁用。
OTLP wire protocol used to reach the collector. Defaults to http/protobuf when otlpEndpoint is set.
用于连接收集器的 OTLP 传输协议。设置 otlpEndpoint 时默认使用 http/protobuf。
Headers sent with every OTLP request, as comma-separated key=value pairs (the standard OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_HEADERS format).
随每个 OTLP 请求发送的请求头，以逗号分隔的 key=value 对表示（标准 OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_HEADERS 格式）。
Blocks the app from checking for and downloading updates from Anthropic. The app will stay on its installed version until updated by other means.
阻止应用从 Anthropic 检查和下载更新。应用会保持当前安装版本，直到通过其他方式更新。
Stop Cowork from fetching updates. You'll need to push new versions yourself.
阻止 Cowork 获取更新。你需要自行推送新版本。
自动更新强制安装窗口
When set, forces a pending update to install after this many hours regardless of user activity. When unset, the app uses a 72-hour window but defers installation while the user is active.
设置后，无论用户是否正在活动，待安装更新都会在指定小时数后强制安装。未设置时，应用使用 72 小时窗口，但会在用户活动时延后安装。
Hours before a downloaded update force-installs. Blank = 72-hour default.
已下载更新强制安装前等待的小时数。留空表示默认 72 小时。
Blocks crash and error reports (stack traces, app state at failure, device/OS info) and performance timing data sent to Anthropic. Used to investigate bugs and monitor responsiveness.
阻止发送给 Anthropic 的崩溃和错误报告（堆栈跟踪、故障时应用状态、设备/OS 信息）以及性能计时数据。这些数据用于排查 bug 和监控响应速度。
Crash and performance reports to Anthropic.
发送给 Anthropic 的崩溃和性能报告。

"Essential" means the signals Anthropic needs to keep your deployment working: **crash stacks**, **startup failure reasons**, and **version/OS metadata**. No prompts, completions, file contents, or identifiers beyond a random install ID.

**What you lose when this is on:** when a Cowork build hits a bug that only reproduces on your OS version or locale, Anthropic can't see it unless a user manually reports. Fixes ship slower.

**Why this is discouraged, not blocked:** some air-gapped environments require zero outbound telemetry as a matter of policy. The switch exists for them — if you don't have that constraint, leave it off.

“必要”指 Anthropic 维持你的部署正常运行所需的信号：**崩溃堆栈**、**启动失败原因**和**版本/OS 元数据**。不包含提示词、补全、文件内容，也不包含随机安装 ID 以外的标识符。

**启用此项会失去什么：** 当 Cowork 构建遇到只在你的 OS 版本或区域设置下复现的 bug 时，除非用户手动报告，否则 Anthropic 无法看到。修复发布会更慢。

**为什么不建议但不阻止：** 一些隔离网络环境因政策要求零出站遥测。此开关就是为它们准备的；如果你没有这个约束，请保持关闭。
Blocks product-usage analytics sent to Anthropic — feature usage, navigation patterns, UI actions.
阻止发送给 Anthropic 的产品使用分析，包括功能使用、导航模式和 UI 操作。
Product-usage analytics and diagnostic-report uploads. No message content.
产品使用分析和诊断报告上传。不包含消息内容。
Blocks connector favicons (fetched from a third-party favicon service — leaks MCP hostnames) and the artifact-preview sandbox iframe. Connectors fall back to letter icons; artifacts do not render.
阻止连接器图标（来自第三方 favicon 服务，会泄露 MCP 主机名）和 artifact 预览沙箱 iframe。连接器会回退为字母图标；artifact 不会渲染。
Favicon fetch and the artifact-preview iframe origin. Artifacts will not render.
favicon 获取和 artifact 预览 iframe 来源。artifact 将不会渲染。
Per-user soft cap, counted client-side over the duration below. Not a server-enforced quota.
按用户设置的软上限，在下面的时间段内由客户端计数。不是服务器强制配额。
Total input+output tokens permitted per window before further messages are refused. Unset = no cap.
每个窗口内允许的输入+输出 token 总数；超过后会拒绝继续发送消息。未设置表示无限制。
Tumbling window length for the token cap. Max 720 hours (30 days). The counter resets at the end of each window.
token 上限的滚动窗口长度。最多 720 小时（30 天）。计数器会在每个窗口结束时重置。
Plugins and skills aren't set in this configuration. Mount plugin bundles to the folder below using your device-management tool and Cowork will load them at launch.
此配置中未设置插件和技能。请使用设备管理工具将插件包挂载到下方文件夹，Cowork 会在启动时加载。
Drop plugin folders here. Read-only to the app.
将插件文件夹放在这里。应用只能读取。

Hosts your network firewall must allow, derived from your current settings. This list is read-only and updates as you make changes. Traffic is HTTPS on port 443 unless a custom port is specified (OTLP, gateway, or MCP server URLs).
根据当前设置推导出的网络防火墙必须放行的主机。此列表为只读，并会随你的更改自动更新。除非指定了自定义端口（OTLP、网关或 MCP 服务器 URL），否则流量使用 443 端口上的 HTTPS。
核心（虚拟机包 + Claude CLI 二进制文件）
VM tool egress is unrestricted — tools may reach any host your firewall allows. Common hosts (not exhaustive):
虚拟机工具出站不受限制；工具可以访问防火墙允许的任何主机。常见主机（非完整列表）：
Read-only to the app. Nothing here is written by Apply or Export.
应用只读。这里的内容不会被“应用”或“导出”写入。
允许用户添加 MCP 服务器

Permit users to add their own local (stdio) MCP 服务器 via Developer settings. HTTP/SSE servers are managed separately. When false, only servers from the 托管 MCP 服务器 list and org-provisioned plugins are available.
允许用户通过开发者设置添加自己的本地（stdio）MCP 服务器。HTTP/SSE 服务器单独管理。关闭后，只能使用“托管 MCP 服务器”列表中的服务器以及组织预配的插件。
Org-pushed remote MCP 服务器. May embed bearer tokens.
组织推送的远程 MCP 服务器。可能包含 bearer token。

Additional hostnames the Cowork sandbox may reach (web fetch, shell commands, package installs). JSON array; supports *.example.com wildcards. The inference provider host is always allowed separately.
Cowork 沙箱可访问的额外主机名（网页获取、shell 命令、包安装）。填写 JSON 数组；支持 *.example.com 通配符。推理提供商主机会始终单独允许。

Additional hostnames the Cowork sandbox may reach (web fetch, shell commands, package installs). JSON array; supports *.example.com wildcards. The inference provider host is always allowed. Set to ["*"] to disable VM-level egress filtering entirely. Common hosts to add for dependency installs (pip/npm/apt/cargo/git):
Cowork 沙箱可访问的额外主机名（网页获取、shell 命令、包安装）。填写 JSON 数组；支持 *.example.com 通配符。推理提供商主机会始终允许。设置为 ["*"] 可完全禁用虚拟机级出站过滤。为依赖安装（pip/npm/apt/cargo/git）添加的常见主机：

Skips the first-launch screen that asks the user to choose between Anthropic sign-in and the organization-managed provider. The app goes straight to the mode implied by this configuration (third-party when inferenceProvider is set), overriding any earlier user choice.
跳过首次启动时要求用户在 Anthropic 登录和组织管理提供商之间选择的页面。应用会直接进入此配置指定的模式（设置 inferenceProvider 时为第三方模式），并覆盖此前的用户选择。
Restricts login to specific org UUID(s). Single UUID string or JSON array.
将登录限制为指定组织 UUID。可填写单个 UUID 字符串或 JSON 数组。
JSON array of absolute paths the user may attach as workspace folders. A leading ~ expands to the per-user home directory. Unset means unrestricted.
用户可作为工作区文件夹附加的绝对路径 JSON 数组。开头的 ~ 会展开为当前用户的主目录。未设置表示不限制。
Absolute path to an executable that prints the inference credential to stdout. When set, the static inferenceGatewayApiKey / inferenceFoundryApiKey is optional.
可执行文件的绝对路径，该程序会将推理凭据输出到 stdout。设置后，静态 inferenceGatewayApiKey / inferenceFoundryApiKey 可不填。
Helper output is cached for this many seconds. Default 3600. Re-runs at the next session start after expiry.
辅助脚本输出会缓存这么多秒。默认 3600。过期后会在下次会话启动时重新运行。
When set, the app fetches `bootstrapUrl` at launch and applies the response as a config overlay. When unset, `bootstrapUrl` is stored but not fetched.
设置后，应用会在启动时获取 `bootstrapUrl`，并将响应作为配置覆盖层应用。未设置时会保存 `bootstrapUrl`，但不会获取。
HTTPS endpoint fetched at app launch. The JSON response body overrides per-user provider config (project ID, region, base URL, model list, credential, OTLP endpoint) for the current user.
应用启动时获取的 HTTPS 端点。JSON 响应体会覆盖当前用户的按用户提供商配置（项目 ID、区域、基础 URL、模型列表、凭据、OTLP 端点）。

JSON object: `clientId` (required), and either `issuer` (https URL — endpoints discovered via /.well-known/openid-configuration) or both `authorizationUrl` and `tokenUrl`. Optional: `scopes` (space-separated string), `redirectPort` (pin the loopback callback port for IdPs that require an exact redirect URI). When set, the app runs an authorization-code-with-PKCE flow in the system browser and sends the resulting access token as a Bearer header on the bootstrap request. When unset, the bootstrap request is unauthenticated.

JSON 对象：`clientId`（必填），以及 `issuer`（https URL，会通过 /.well-known/openid-configuration 发现端点）或同时提供 `authorizationUrl` 和 `tokenUrl`。可选项：`scopes`（空格分隔字符串）、`redirectPort`（为要求精确重定向 URI 的 IdP 固定回环回调端口）。设置后，应用会在系统浏览器中运行带 PKCE 的授权码流程，并在 bootstrap 请求中以 Bearer 请求头发送获取到的访问令牌。未设置时，bootstrap 请求不带认证。
HTTPS endpoint that returns a per-user JSON config overlay. Values from the response override local settings and become read-only.
返回按用户 JSON 配置覆盖层的 HTTPS 端点。响应中的值会覆盖本地设置，并变为只读。
JSON: clientId + issuer (or authorizationUrl + tokenUrl). When set, the bootstrap request sends a Bearer token from a browser sign-in.
JSON：clientId + issuer（或 authorizationUrl + tokenUrl）。设置后，bootstrap 请求会发送浏览器登录获取的 Bearer token。
Fetch and apply the URL above at launch. While off, the URL is saved but ignored.
启动时获取并应用上方 URL。关闭时会保存该 URL，但不会使用。
GCP region where your Vertex AI Claude models are deployed.
部署 Vertex AI Claude 模型的 GCP 区域。
Absolute path to service-account JSON. Leave blank to fall back to ADC.
服务账号 JSON 的绝对路径。留空则回退到 ADC。
Desktop-app OAuth client ID — enables Sign in with Google instead of a credentials file.
桌面应用 OAuth 客户端 ID；启用 Google 登录以替代凭据文件。
Secret for the Desktop-app OAuth client above.
上方桌面应用 OAuth 客户端的密钥。
Override the Google OAuth scopes (space-separated). Leave blank for the default.
覆盖 Google OAuth 范围（用空格分隔）。留空则使用默认值。
Overrides profile when both are set.
两者都设置时会覆盖配置文件。
For VPC endpoints or gateway proxies.
用于 VPC 端点或网关代理。
Ignored if a bearer token is set.
设置 bearer token 后会忽略此项。
Folder with AWS config/credentials. Defaults to ~/.aws when no bearer token is set.
包含 AWS config/credentials 的文件夹。未设置 bearer token 时默认使用 ~/.aws。
Absolute path to an executable that prints the credential.
输出凭据的可执行文件绝对路径。
Optional auth headers for the collector.
收集器的可选认证请求头。
defaultMessage:"Value does not match the required format."
defaultMessage:"由你的组织管理 - 只读"
defaultMessage:"This configuration is managed by your organization. Contact your IT administrator to make changes."
defaultMessage:"此配置由你的组织管理。如需更改，请联系 IT 管理员。"
defaultMessage:"This configuration contains sensitive values. They will be written to the exported file in plain text."
defaultMessage:"此配置包含敏感值。它们会以明文写入导出的文件。"
Allow Claude to automatically classify sessions as blocked, ready for review, or done. Classifying sessions counts towards your plan usage. Applies to new sessions.
允许 Claude 自动将会话分类为已阻止、待审核或已完成。分类会话会计入你的计划用量。适用于新会话。
Are you sure you want to delete 1 chat? This cannot be undone.
你确定要删除 1 个聊天吗？此操作无法撤消。
Are you sure you want to delete {count} chat? This cannot be undone.
你确定要删除 {count} 个聊天吗？此操作无法撤消。
Are you sure you want to delete {count} chats? This cannot be undone.
你确定要删除 {count} 个聊天吗？此操作无法撤消。
Auto-archive after PR merge or close
PR 合并或关闭后自动归档
Automatically archive desktop sessions when the associated pull request is merged or closed.
关联的拉取请求合并或关闭后，自动归档桌面会话。
Auto-populate the model picker from /v1/models at launch.
启动时从 /v1/models 自动填充模型选择器。
Auto-populate the model picker from {url} at launch.
启动时从 {url} 自动填充模型选择器。
Claude understands your codebase and helps you build, debug, and ship faster. Upgrade your plan to get started.
Claude 了解你的代码库，能帮助你更快地构建、调试和发布。升级你的计划即可开始使用。
Claude understands your codebase and helps you build, debug, and ship faster. Get started in the desktop app.
Claude 了解你的代码库，能帮助你更快地构建、调试和发布。请在桌面应用中开始使用。
Created when you sign in to Claude Code. Revoke a token to sign out from that device.
登录 Claude Code 时创建。撤销令牌即可让该设备退出登录。
Choose where Claude Desktop sends inference requests.
选择 Claude Desktop 将推理请求发送到哪里。
删除 Anthropic 存储的会话

Permanently delete Anthropic's server-side copies of your Claude Code sessions. Sessions stored locally on your computer aren't affected. Claude Code on the web sessions are managed separately — go to Claude Code.
永久删除 Anthropic 服务器端保存的 Claude Code 会话副本。本机存储的会话不受影响。网页版 Claude Code 会话需要单独管理，请前往 Claude Code。

Permanently delete Anthropic’s server-side copies of your Claude Code sessions. Sessions stored locally on your computer aren’t affected. Claude Code on the web sessions are managed separately — go to Claude Code.
永久删除 Anthropic 服务器端保存的 Claude Code 会话副本。本机存储的会话不受影响。网页版 Claude Code 会话需要单独管理，请前往 Claude Code。
Extra HTTP headers sent on every inference request to the configured provider. For tenant routing, org IDs, Bedrock Guardrails, etc.
每次向所配置提供商发送推理请求时附加的 HTTP 请求头。可用于租户路由、组织 ID、Bedrock Guardrails 等场景。
Use a darker, near-black background when dark mode is on.
开启深色模式时使用更暗、接近黑色的背景。
When you create a pull request, Claude automatically monitors it for CI failures and review comments, then responds proactively. Claude may post comments on your behalf.
创建拉取请求后，Claude 会自动监控 CI 失败和评审评论，并主动响应。Claude 可能会代表你发表评论。
Full URL of the inference gateway endpoint.
推理网关端点的完整 URL。
Models to show in the picker. First entry is the default.
显示在模型选择器中的模型。第一项为默认模型。
Override the auto-discovered model list. First entry is the default.
覆盖自动发现的模型列表。第一项为默认模型。
Selects the credential source. When set, only that source is used (no fallback).
选择凭据来源。设置后只会使用该来源，不会回退。
禁用 claude:// 深度链接处理
Domains Cowork's tools may reach during a turn. Also surfaced under 出站要求.
Cowork 的工具在一次任务中可以访问的域名。也会显示在出站要求中。
Mount plugin bundles to this folder using your device-management tool and Cowork will load them at launch. The folder is read-only; tool policies you set below are saved in this configuration.
使用设备管理工具将插件包挂载到此文件夹，Cowork 会在启动时加载。该文件夹为只读；下面设置的工具策略会保存在此配置中。
Org-pushed MCP servers: remote (HTTP/SSE) or local (stdio command). May embed bearer tokens.
组织推送的 MCP 服务器：远程（HTTP/SSE）或本地（stdio 命令）。可能嵌入 Bearer 令牌。
Per-tool approval policy. "ask" requires user approval before each call; "allow" is the default. Use Disabled built-in tools to remove a tool entirely.
按工具设置的审批策略。"ask" 表示每次调用前都需要用户批准；"allow" 为默认值。如需完全移除某个工具，请使用“禁用内置工具”。
Prompts, completions, and your data are never sent to Anthropic. Telemetry covers crash and usage signals only.
提示、补全和你的数据绝不会发送给 Anthropic。诊断数据只包含崩溃和使用信号。
Tags telemetry events with your organization's UUID so Anthropic support can find them. Not used for auth.
使用你组织的 UUID 标记诊断数据事件，方便 Anthropic 支持人员定位。不会用于认证。
Users see only this provider at the login screen. The option to sign in to Claude.ai is hidden.
用户在登录页只会看到此提供商。Claude.ai 登录选项会被隐藏。
{category} 需要 {count, plural, one {{label}} other {# 个字段}}
Per-tool approval policy. "ask" requires user approval before each call; "allow" is the default. Use 禁用内置工具 to remove a tool entirely.
按工具设置的审批策略。“ask” 表示每次调用前都需要用户批准；“allow” 为默认值。如需完全移除某个工具，请使用“禁用内置工具”。
Hi! How can I help you today?

Permanently delete Anthropic's server-side copies of your Claude Code sessions. Sessions stored locally on your computer aren't affected. Claude Code on the web sessions are managed separately — go to

Permanently delete Anthropic’s server-side copies of your Claude Code sessions. Sessions stored locally on your computer aren’t affected. Claude Code on the web sessions are managed separately — go to

Allow Claude to use coarse location metadata (city/region) to improve product experiences.
允许 Claude 使用粗略位置元数据（城市/地区）来改进产品体验。
Allow the use of your chats and coding sessions to train and improve Anthropic AI models.
允许使用你的聊天和编码会话来训练和改进 Anthropic AI 模型。
Allow Claude to remember relevant context from your chats. This setting controls memory for both chats and projects.
允许 Claude 记住你聊天中的相关上下文。此设置会同时控制聊天和项目的记忆。
Import memory from other AI providers
从其他 AI 提供商导入记忆
Bring relevant context and data from another AI provider to Claude. We'll provide a prompt you can use to fetch the memory from your other account.
将其他 AI 提供商中的相关上下文和数据导入 Claude。我们会提供一段提示词，你可以用它从其他账号获取记忆。
Head there to browse, connect, and manage them.
请前往那里浏览、连接和管理它们。
. Head there to browse, connect, and manage them.
。请前往那里浏览、连接和管理它们。
Add and manage MCP servers that you’re working on.
添加并管理你正在使用的 MCP 服务器。

添加并管理你正在使用的 MCP 服务器。
Point this configuration at a bootstrap URL to have your organization manage these settings remotely.
将此配置指向一个引导 URL，让你的组织远程管理这些设置。
Archive 1 task? You can find it in the Archived tab.
要归档 1 个任务吗？你可以在“已归档”标签页中找到它。
message:F?`Archive ${j.items.length} ${1===j.items.length?y.noun:y.nouns}? You can find ${1===j.items.length?"it":"them"} in the Archived tab.`
message:F?`归档 ${j.items.length} 个${1===j.items.length?y.noun:y.nouns}？你可以在“已归档”标签页中找到${1===j.items.length?"它":"它们"}。`
Offer Auto mode in the Cowork and Code permission selectors. Claude decides which actions need approval.
在 Cowork 和 Code 权限选择器中提供 Auto mode。Claude 会决定哪些操作需要批准。
When enabled, users can select Auto mode (Code tab) / Act without asking (Cowork tab). Claude runs a safety classifier on each action and only prompts for approval on actions it judges risky.
启用后，用户可以选择 Auto mode（Code 标签页）/ Act without asking（Cowork 标签页）。Claude 会对每个操作运行安全分类器，并且只在判断为有风险的操作上请求批准。

When enabled, users can select **Auto mode** (Code tab) / **Act without asking** (Cowork tab). Claude runs a safety classifier on each action and only prompts for approval on actions it judges risky.

Requires a model that supports the classifier (Claude 4.6+). Older models show the option greyed out.

This is the permissive opposite of the per-tool `ask` policy above; both may be set.

启用后，用户可以选择 **Auto mode**（Code 标签页）/ **Act without asking**（Cowork 标签页）。Claude 会对每个操作运行安全分类器，并且只在判断为有风险的操作上请求批准。

需要支持该分类器的模型（Claude 4.6+）。较旧模型会将此选项显示为灰色。

这是上方按工具设置的 `ask` 策略的宽松反向选项；两者可以同时设置。
Requires a model that supports the classifier (Claude 4.6+). Older models show the option greyed out.
需要支持该分类器的模型（Claude 4.6+）。较旧模型会将此选项显示为灰色。
This is the permissive opposite of the per-tool ask policy above; both may be set.
这是上方按工具设置的 ask 策略的宽松反向选项；两者可以同时设置。

"Nonessential" covers two things: **product-usage analytics** (which features get used, navigation patterns; no prompts or completions) and the **Send** action in Help \u2192 Generate Diagnostic Report. Turning this on stops both.\n\nDestination for both: `claude.ai`. Already listed under Egress Requirements \u2192 Nonessential telemetry.

“Nonessential”包括两项：**product-usage analytics**（会使用哪些功能、导航模式；不含提示词或补全）以及 Help → Generate Diagnostic Report 中的 **Send** 操作。开启此项会同时停止两者。\n\n两者的目标地址都是：`claude.ai`。已列在 Egress Requirements → Nonessential telemetry 下。
